spec_match.rationale: The runtime and snippet now use `SpeechRecognition.start(track)` for separate MediaStreamTrack inputs, matching the Web Speech API IDL.

interactive.rationale: Both source panels have real start and stop controls, per-source language selection, recognizer status, transcript output, and track-ended cleanup.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede now describes source-specific recognizer state plus any captured speech instead of promising words from the generated tone track.

edge_cases.rationale: The page handles missing SpeechRecognition, `start(track)` fallback, microphone denial, and source track ending in the visible UI.

references.rationale: The page now includes the canonical ChromeStatus link and a direct Web Speech API spec reference.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles and derived color functions were removed in favor of shared CSS variables and explicit contrast pairs.

summary: Multi-source captions now uses the canonical track overload, demonstrates a genuinely distinct generated source track, and includes the required references.
